timeline.event: An haife shi a Frankfurt am Main, Jamus.
Ya fara shakkun imani bayan girgizar kasa a Lisbon.
Ya sake jin shakkun imani sakamakon Yakin Shekaru Bakwai.
Soyayyarsa da Gretchen ta ruguje.
Yayi soyayya da Anna Katharina Schönkopf yayin da yake karatu a Jami'ar Leipzig.
Ya rubuta wasan kwaikwayonsa na farko, "Caprice na Masoya".
Ya koma gida inda yake murmurewa sannan ya bunkasa jin tsoron Allah ta hanyar cudanya da Susanne von Klettenberg.
Ya sami digirin digirgir a fannin shari'a a Jami'ar Strasbourg, inda ya hadu da Herder kuma ya bude idanunsa game da asalin adabi, lamarin da ya kawo motsin 'Storm and Stress'.
Ya fara aikin lauya.
Ya wuce Babbar Kotun Wetzlar don yin aikin koya, inda ya hadu da Charlotte Buff.
Ya wallafa wasan kwaikwayo "Götz von Berlichingen".
Ya wallafa littafin "Bakin Cikin Matashi Werther".
Ya yi alkawarin aure da Lili Schönemann amma daga baya suka fasa.
Ya isa Weimar bisa gayyatar Duke Karl August na Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach.
Ya jagoranci harkokin gwamnati kusan shekaru 10 a farkon zamansa a Weimar, inda ya gina nasarori a matsayin mai ba da shawara ga sarki kuma shugaban majalisar ministoci.
Ya rubuta wasan kwaikwayo na bakin ciki "Iphigenia in Tauris" (salo na zance).
Ya rubuta "Torquato Tasso".
Ya ce, "Ni ba makiyin Kirista ko Kirista na baki (un-christian) ba ne, sai dai ni ba Kirista bane (non-christian)."
Ya kafa ra'ayinsa na adabin gargajiya yayin tafiyarsa a Italiya, kuma ya rubuta "Iphigenia in Tauris" (salo na waka).
Yayi tafiya zuwa Italiya wanda ya dauki tsawon shekara daya da rabi.
Ya wallafa "Egmont".
Ya koma Jamus.
Ya fara zama tare da Christiane von Vulpius.
Ya haifi dansa na fari, August.
An fara wallafa "Torquato Tasso".
Ya bi Duke August a lokacin Yakin Coalition na Farko da Faransa, inda yayi fada a Yakin Valmy.
Ya yi fada a Siege na Mainz.
Yayin dawowarsa daga taron kimiyyar halitta a Jena, ya hadu da Schiller kuma suka zama abokai.
Ya rubuta littafin ilimi "Wilhelm Meister's Apprenticeship".
Ya rubuta wakar labari "Hermann da Dorothea".
Rasuwar Schiller ta girgiza shi sosai.
Ya kammala kashi na farko na "Faust".
Ya kammala "Theory of Colours".
Ya rubuta "Italian Journey".
Ya rubuta "West-Eastern Diwan".
Ya kammala "Wilhelm Meister's Journeyman Years".
Ya rubuta "Marienbad Elegy".
Ya rubuta "Second Roman Stay".
Ya kammala kashi na biyu na "Faust".
Ya rasu.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Ayyukan Adabi
keyAchievements.description: Ya kammala adabin gargajiya na Jamus ta hanyar kirkirar ayyukan adabi da yawa ciki har da "Bakin Cikin Matashi Werther", "Wilhelm Meister's Apprenticeship", da "Faust".

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Cibiyar Al'ada ta Weimar
keyAchievements.description: Ya koma Weimar a shekarar 1775 kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen mayar da birnin cibiyar al'ada.

keyAchievements.title: Ayyuka a Matsayin Ma'aikacin Gwamnati da Masanin Kimiyya
keyAchievements.description: Yayi aiki a matsayin shugaban kasa a Masarautar Weimar inda ya shiga harkokin gwamnati, kuma ya bar abubuwa masu yawa sannan yayi nuna sha'awa a fannoni daban daban na kimiyyar halitta kamar ilimin tsirrai, tsarin jiki, ma'adinai, ilimin kasa, da ka'idar launi.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Adabin Gargajiya na Jamus
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa adabin gargajiya yayin tafiyarsa zuwa Italiya sannan ya hadu da Schiller, kuma tare suka bunkasa tsarin gargajiya na Weimar a Jamus.

keyAchievements.title: Daraktan Gidan Wasan Kwaikwayo na Sarauta
keyAchievements.description: A matsayin darakta na gidan wasan kwaikwayo na sarauta, yayi aiki a bangaren gudanarwa, jagoranci, horar da 'yan wasa, da sauransu, inda ya daga wasan kwaikwayon zuwa matsayi na duniya.

faq.question: Wanene Goethe?
faq.answer: Ya kasance marubuci mai tsarin gargajiya, masanin falsafa, kuma masanin kimiyya na Jamus wanda yayi aiki a matsayin shugaban kasa a Masarautar Weimar.

faq.question: Menene fitattun ayyukan Goethe?
faq.answer: Fitattun ayyukansa sun hada da "Bakin Cikin Matashi Werther", "Wilhelm Meister's Apprenticeship", da "Faust".

faq.question: Wane matsayi Goethe ya dauka game da addini?
faq.answer: An haife shi a gidan mabiya addinin Lutheran, amma ya fara shakkun addini bayan girgizar kasa ta Lisbon da Yakin Shekaru Bakwai, sannan ya kira kansa 'wanda ba Kirista ba' (non-christian).

faq.question: Wace rawa Goethe yayi a Weimar?
faq.answer: Ya koma Weimar a shekarar 1775 inda ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen mayar da birnin cibiyar al'ada kuma yayi aiki a matsayin dan gwamnati da ke tsara al'amuran kasa.

timeline.event: An haifi Mary Wollstonecraft Shelley.
Ta rasa mahaifiyarta kwanaki 11 bayan an haife ta.
Ta fara soyayya da Percy Bysshe Shelley, daya daga cikin mabiya siyasar mahaifinta.
Ta samar da ra'ayin rubuta littafin "Frankenstein" yayin da take shafe lokacin rani kusa da Geneva a Switzerland, tare da Lord Byron da John William Polidori.
Ta auri Percy Bysshe Shelley bayan kashe kanta da matar Percy, Harriet tayi.
Ma'auratan Shelley sun bar Birtaniya sannan suka koma Italiya.
An wallafa littafin "Frankenstein; ko Modern Prometheus".
Mijinta Percy Bysshe Shelley ya nutse kuma ya mutu yayin da wata guguwa ta nutsar da kwale-kwalen shi kusa da Viareggio.
Ta koma Birtaniya.
An wallafa littafin tarihi "Valperga".
An wallafa littafin bayanin karshen zamani "Dan Adam na Karshe".
Ta rubuta mukalolin tarihin rayuwa don kundin tsarin sani na Dionysius Lardner mai suna "Cabinet Cyclopaedia".
An wallafa littafin tarihi "The Fortunes of Perkin Warbeck".
An wallafa littafin "Lodore".
An wallafa littafin "Falkner".
An wallafa littafin tafiya "Rambles in Germany and Italy".
Ta rasu sakamakon wata cuta da ake tunanin kansa ne na kwakwalwa.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta "Frankenstein"
keyAchievements.description: Ta rubuta littafin adabin Gothic "Frankenstein; ko Modern Prometheus" (1818), wanda ake dauka a matsayin daya daga cikin misalan farko na labaran kimiyyar zahiri (science fiction).

keyAchievements.title: Gyara da Gabatar da Ayyukan Mijinta
keyAchievements.description: Ta gyara sannan ta gabatar da ayyukan mijinta, mawakin Romanticism kuma masanin falsafa Percy Bysshe Shelley.

faq.question: Wane aiki ne yasa aka fi sanin Mary Shelley?
faq.answer: Har zuwa shekarun 1970, an fi saninta da littafin "Frankenstein" da kuma kokarinta na wallafa ayyukan mijinta.

faq.question: Su waye iyayen Mary Shelley?
faq.answer: Mahaifinta masanin falsafar siyasa ne William Godwin, kuma mahaifiyarta masaniyar falsafa ce kuma mai fafutukar kare hakkin mata Mary Wollstonecraft.

faq.question: Menene babban jigon ayyukan Mary Shelley?
faq.answer: Ayyukanta sukan ce hadin kai da tausayi, musamman abin da mata ke aikatawa a cikin iyali, sune hanya don kawo gyara a tsarin al'umma.

mary-shelley.missingDataNote: Ba a hada da shekarar da mahaifin Mary Shelley ya auri Mary Jane Clairmont ba saboda ba a nuna hakan a ainihin takardar ba.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Ayrshire, Scotland a ranar 6 ga Agusta.
Ya cancanta a matsayin likita daga Kwalejin Likitanci ta Asibitin St. Mary, London.
Ya gano sinadarin lysozyme, wanda shine babbar nasarar farko a binciken maganin kwayoyin cuta.
Ba zato ba tsammani ya gano sinadarin maganin penicillin a cikin gungun naman kwayoyin cuta.
Ya karbi Kyautar Nobel a fannin Likitanci tare da Florey da Chain.
An haife shi a Tsibirin Nevis dake Tekun Caribbean.
Ya bi George Washington a matsayin amintaccen mataimaki a lokacin Yakin Neman 'Yancin Amurka.
Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tsara Kundin Tsarin Mulkin Amurka kuma ya rubuta Takaddun Federalist.
Shugaba Washington ya nada shi a matsayin Sakataren Baitulmalin Amurka na farko.
Ya rasu sakamakon mugun rauni da ya samu a fadan da yayi da abokin hamayyarsa na siyasa, Aaron Burr.
An haife shi a Boston, Massachusetts a ranar 17 ga Janairu.
Ya wallafa fitowar farko na "Poor Richard's Almanack" wanda ya sami nasara sosai.
Yayi shahararren gwajin tashi da abin tashi (kite) domin tabbatar da cewa walkiya wutar lantarki ce.
Ya bayar da gudummawa wajen tsara Sanarwar 'Yancin Amurka a matsayin memba na Kwamitin Mutane Biyar.
Ya sanya hannu sannan ya tattauna kan Yarjejeniyar Paris wadda ta kawo karshen Yakin Neman 'Yancin Amurka a hukumance.
